chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Appl. No.2814 of 2025 Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Syed Fiaz-ul-Hassan Shah 17.11.2025 Mr. Sajid Ali Advocate for Applicant a/w Sadam Hussain Chang, advocate. Mr. Mumtaz Ali Shah, A.P.G. = O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J:- Three persons including applicant were found in suspicious condition by a police team headed by Sip Muhammad Saleem of P.S. Darakhshan, Karachi. Out of them two escaped throwing a small bag containing Charas. Whereas, the applicant was arrested from an empty Plot Near Darakshan Market Phase-V, Karachi and from him 505 grams of Charas was recovered, however, in the investigation both the accused who had escaped have been let off by the police u/s 497 Cr.P.C. 2. Applicant’s counsel submits that letting off of co-accused is a sufficient ground for grant of bail to the applicant as it makes the case against him as one of further enquiry. Learned APG has opposed bail but could not justify letting off of the co-accused. We, therefore, feel that applicant has been able to make out a case for bail as there is no proper justification for letting off the co-accused by the I.O. Accordingly, this bail application is allowed and the applicant is granted bail subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- and P.R. bond in the same amount to the satisfaction of the trial court. 3. The observations made herein above are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. This Cr. Bail Application is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Imran
